name: CBF Macro Bot
description: Record gameplay in Practice Mode and play it back in normal mode. Built for Syzzi's CBF (Click Between Frames) with fallback support for RobTop's built-in frame stepping. Ships with an accurate practice bug fix and a frame-rate-independent speedhack.

auto-record.name: Auto-record in Practice Mode
auto-record.description: Automatically start recording when entering Practice Mode.

auto-stop-at-end.name: Auto-stop at level end
auto-stop-at-end.description: Stops recording when the level is completed.

default-speed.name: Default speedhack speed
default-speed.description: Default speed multiplier for the built-in frame-independent speedhack.

practice-fix-enabled.name: Enable practice bug fix
practice-fix-enabled.description: Forces deterministic physics in Practice Mode so macros recorded there play back correctly in normal mode.

save-folder.name: Macro save folder
save-folder.description: Subfolder inside the mod's save directory where macros are stored.

hotkey-record.name: Record / Stop hotkey
hotkey-record.description: Key name (e.g. F6, F7, SPACE, KEY_A).

hotkey-play.name: Play / Stop hotkey
hotkey-play.description: Key name (e.g. F6, F7, SPACE, KEY_A).

syzzi.cbf.description: Optional: enables sub-frame tick precision for macros.
